texto: I love him, and I love us together more than I love myself. I will do what you ask, but if," Kara swallowed hard, "...if I lose him, I'll join him in death." Vena resisted the urge to stroke the fine mass of dark curls away from the heart-shaped face that gazed at her so fiercely. The woman who faced her, proudly announcing her ability to choose, was no longer the winsome, pliable girl of the garden.
explicacao: Citação de Anna LaForge sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I love him, and I love us together more than I love myself. I will do what you ask, but if," Kara…” articula amor, fantasy, science-fiction em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: I love him, and I love us together more than I love myself. I will do what you ask, but if," Kara swallowed hard, "...if I lose him, I'll join him in death." Vena resisted the urge to stroke the fine mass of dark curls away from the heart-shaped face that gazed at her so fiercely. The woman who faced her, proudly announcing her ability to choose, was no longer the winsome, pliable girl of the garden.
